title: Super Nani
desc: In this poignant film, Bharti, an unappreciated mother, finds empowerment through her grandson, Mann, leading to family reconciliation and an important lesson on valuing mothers' sacrifices.

title: Dirty Politics
desc: A dark political drama uncovering deceit, greed, and power struggles as a woman's disappearance sparks a wave of shocking revelations.

title: Raazi
desc: Sehmat Khan, an undercover RAW agent, is married into a Pakistani family by her father, enabling her to infiltrate and extract intelligence on enemy operations.

title: Khushi
desc: A young man from an agnostic family falls in love with the daughter of his father's enemy, a devout Hindu leader, testing family loyalty.

title: Socha Na Tha
desc: Viren and Aditi initially reject their arranged marriage but grow close as friends, eventually realizing they've fallen in love with each other.

title: Mantra
desc: A professor decides to buy an allegedly haunted ancestral property on the condition that someone stays there. A local goon spends three months in the house in a bid to earn a quick profit.

title: Bhakti Ras
desc: Join our engaging devotional program to deepen your spirituality, connect with like-minded individuals, and explore meaningful practices that enrich your daily life and strengthen your faith.

title: Jai Maa Vaishno Devi
desc: A childless couple worships Maa Vaishno Devi. When a demon destroys their ritual, the goddess defeats the demon and blesses the couple with lasting fortune together.

title: Aarti Maa Vaishno Devi Adhkuwari
desc: Devout Hindus and priests gather to pray to Goddess Vaishno Devi, performing rituals and singing uplifting devotional songs, sharing their faith and devotion in a vibrant atmosphere.

desc: A bride-to-be is abducted for ransom just before her wedding. During captivity, she forms an uneasy bond with her kidnapper, testing loyalties, love, and safety.

desc: In a small UP town, brothers Nannu and Munnu take divergent paths: one descends into crime, while the other builds a respectable life running a coaching centre.

desc: A doctor takes four patients with intellectual disabilities to a cricket match but gets kidnapped. The patients team up with a TV channel employee to rescue her.

desc: Aman falls in love with Esha and proposes, but she rejects him; love blossoms until complications arise when Dushyant appears, claiming to be Esha's husband.

title: Hameshaa
desc: In a tale of love and rivalry, three friends navigate relationships across lifetimes, facing challenges that threaten to repeat a tragic fate. Will love prevail?

desc: Convict Yogi Shankar, after serving seven years, abducts Judge Jagdish Verma's pregnant wife, leading to a dark revenge scheme that threatens the entire Verma family.
